title: New Feature 📣 Generate Sales quotes, invoices and receipts on monday sales CRM
excerpt: With the latest GetSign release you can turn your board’s sub-items into PDF line items - Need to master you CPQ process and generate a proposal with line items directly from monday sales CRM? Or generate an invoice that…

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
With the latest GetSign release you can turn your board’s sub-items into PDF line items - Need to master you CPQ process and generate a proposal with line items directly from monday sales CRM? Or generate an invoice that calculate taxes, totals and credits without switching, exporting, importing docs from multiple tabs and apps? You can now do it with GetSign in minutes!

Learn more in this short demo

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Wow! Love it!
